experimental_support.finding: Site-directed mutagenesis supports a Cys-Glu-Lys catalytic triad; E59Q/E59D and K134N caused loss of activity, and K134R strongly reduced activity.
Cys166 was identified as the active-site nucleophile; C166S/C166A caused loss of activity.

structure_support.uniprot_note: PDB cross-reference covers chain A residues 1-341.

structure_support.method: ProteinGym AF2 heavy-atom shell around curated active-site residues

label_decision: Use positions 59, 134, and 166 as the exact catalytic-site slice for AMIE_PSEAE_Wrenbeck_2017.
